who: small law practices managing 5–15 client files/month
offer: For small law practices processing 5–15 client files/month, disorganization causes missed deadlines. We provide a streamlined tracking system instead of manual file organization.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law practices
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to small law practices with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try file categorization and search functionality on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
